crons.name: client-health
crons.prompt: Client Health Check: Wednesday 9 AM. Scan active clients in ~/code/knowledge-sync/areas/clearworks/clients/ and tasks/clearworks/active.md Client Delivery section. Calculate health scores. Flag >14 days no contact, stalled deliverables, overdue items. Send to Josh via Telegram (6690120787).

crons.name: action-items
crons.prompt: Action Items Check: Weekdays 4 PM. Check open items from tasks/clearworks/active.md Client Delivery section. Flag overdue items (check sent folder first!). Send summary to Josh via Telegram (6690120787) if anything needs attention.

crons.name: deliverable-status
crons.prompt: Deliverable Status: Monday 9 AM. Review all active projects in tasks/clearworks/active.md. Check git activity across clearpath, lifecycle-killer, nonprofit-hub, academy. Flag stalled projects (no commits in >5 days with open deliverables). Send weekly status to Josh via Telegram (6690120787).
